result:
The implementation is complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

## Changes Made

### 1. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt` (line 75)
- Added `RESCHEDULE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card)` as a new enum value in `ViewerCommand`
- Uses the existing string resource `card_editor_reschedule_card` which has the value "Reschedule"
- No default key binding is assigned (falls through to `else -> ArrayList()`), so users can configure their own gesture/controller button mapping

### 2. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt` (lines 1171-1174)
- Added a `ViewerCommand.RESCHEDULE` case to `Reviewer.executeCommand()` that calls the existing `showRescheduleCardDialog()` method
- This follows the exact same pattern used by other commands like `MARK`, `ADD_NOTE`, and `CARD_INFO`

## How It Works

- The new `RESCHEDULE` command now appears in the gesture/controller button mapping settings alongside other commands like "Bury card", "Undo", etc.
- When triggered via a gesture or controller button, it opens the reschedule dialog directly, allowing users to set the number of days for rescheduling in a single action
- The existing `showRescheduleCardDialog()` method handles all the actual reschedule logic (showing the dialog, executing the reschedule operation, undo support)
